summary: Tested rejection reason display and account age check features. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - rejection reasons are displayed correctly in admin view with 'Admin Notes' field showing the reason. Account age check correctly shows 3 days (not 7 days) in redemption rules API.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly saves reject_reason and admin_notes when admin rejects bill payment (server.py line 21578-21580)
Frontend Orders.js correctly displays rejection reason using: request.admin_notes || request.reject_reason || request.rejection_reason (line 438)
Frontend BillPayments.js correctly displays rejection reason using: req.reject_reason || req.admin_notes (line 703)
Redemption rules API correctly returns min_account_age_days: 3 (server.py line 12713)
seed_data_creation: Used existing rejected bill payment requests for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rejection reason feature is working correctly. Admin can reject with reason, and users see the reason in their requests. Account age check is set to 3 days.

Rejection reason saved in database.details: reject_reason and admin_notes fields are saved when admin rejects

Admin view shows rejection reason.details: Admin Bill Payments page shows 'Admin Notes' field with rejection reason in expanded view

Request Timeline shows rejection.details: Timeline shows 'Request Rejected' with 'Processed by: Admin' and processing time

api_endpoints_tested.response: Returns requests with reject_reason and admin_notes fields
Returns user's requests with reject_reason and admin_notes
